description:
As a venue
  I want to filter artists with precise criteria
  So that I can find the perfect talents for my events

elements.name: Open filter panel from search results

steps.name: I am on the search results page for "jazz"
I click on the filters button
I should see the filter panel
the filter panel should display the current results count
I am on the search results page for "musique"
I should see "Jazz" in the active filters
I should see "Blues" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "musicien"
I should see "Guitare" in the active filters
I should see "Piano" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "artiste"
I should see "📍 Paris" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "concert"
I should see "500€ - 1000€" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "spectacle"
I should see "500€ - 1000€" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "professionnel"
I should see "Professionnel" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "disponible"
I should see "Disponible maintenant" in the active filters
I am on the search results page for "artiste"
I should see 5 active filters displayed
the URL should contain all selected filters
I am on the search results page with active filters
I click the X button on "Jazz" filter badge
I am on the search results page with multiple active filters

result.error_message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: Expected <div.mb-6.flex.flex-wrap.gap-2.items-center> not to exist in the DOM, but it was continuously found.

steps.name: only the search query should remain in the URL
I am on the search results page for "music"
all filter selections should be cleared

result.error_message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: Expected [ <button.btn.btn-sm.btn-primary>, 2 more... ] not to exist in the DOM, but it was continuously found.

steps.name: the reset button should be disabled
I am on the search results page with filters "genres=Jazz&location=Paris&minPrice=500"
I should see "Jazz" in the active filters
I should see "📍 Paris" in the active filters
I should see "500€" in the active filters
I apply multiple filters on the search page
I open the URL in a new session
all the filters should be applied
the search results should match the filters

result.error_message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: Expected to find element: `[data-cy="search-results"]`, but never found it.

elements.name: Active filters count in panel header

steps.name: I am on the search results page for "artiste"
the filter panel header should show the count of selected genres
the filter panel header should show the count of selected instruments
I am on the search results page for "jazz"
the panel header should display the current number of results
the results count should update dynamically

name: Smart Filtering System
